title: Floral Polish Delight
description: A unique dessert combining the sweetness of floral flavors with the richness of polish chocolate, making it an indulgent treat.
instructions: In a medium bowl, whisk together flour, unsalted butter, and grated lemon zest.
In a separate bowl, mix floral honey, polish chocolate chips, and vanilla extract.
Gradually add the dry ingredients to the honey mixture, stirring until combined.
Pour the mixture into a greased 6-inch round cake pan.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted comes out clean.
Let the cake cool for 5 minutes before transferring it to a wire rack to cool completely.
Drizzle with heavy cream and serve warm.
